package com.example.appserver.cache;

import static org.mockito.Mockito.*;

import java.util.List;

import org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;
import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
import org.mockito.Mockito;

import com.example.servercommon.model.ErrorCodeSettingModel;
import com.example.servercommon.repository.ErrorCodeSettingRepository;

class ErrorCodeCacheTest {

    private ErrorCodeSettingRepository errorCodeSettingRepository;
    private ErrorCodeCache errorCodeCache;

    @BeforeEach
    void setUp() {
        errorCodeSettingRepository = Mockito.mock(ErrorCodeSettingRepository.class);
        errorCodeCache = Mockito.spy(new ErrorCodeCache(errorCodeSettingRepository));
    }

    @Test
    void testUpdateCache_shouldReloadCacheWithDataFromRepository() {
        // 準備
        List<ErrorCodeSettingModel> mockList = List.of(new ErrorCodeSettingModel());
        when(errorCodeSettingRepository.findAll()).thenReturn(mockList);

        // 実行
        errorCodeCache.updateCache();

        // 検証
        verify(errorCodeSettingRepository).findAll();
        verify(errorCodeCache).reloadCache("errorCodes", mockList);
    }

    @Test
    void testGetCache_shouldReturnCachedErrorCodes() {
        // 準備
        List<ErrorCodeSettingModel> mockList = List.of(new ErrorCodeSettingModel());
        doReturn(mockList).when(errorCodeCache).getCache("errorCodes");

        // 実行
        List<ErrorCodeSettingModel> result = errorCodeCache.getCache();

        // 検証
        verify(errorCodeCache).getCache("errorCodes");
        org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(mockList, result);
    }
}
